hyperedges.label: Multi-Agent CLI Context Loading (CLAUDE.md + GEMINI.md + AGENTS.md share modes/)
Pipeline Data Flow (auto-pipeline → TSV tracker-additions → merge-tracker → applications.md)
Community Governance & Enforcement (Code of Conduct + Governance + Contributing)
Core Evaluation Pipeline — oferta + pdf + tracker
Japanese Language Mode Set
CV Generation Variants — HTML PDF + LaTeX + Canva
All language pipeline modes implement the same shared pipeline workflow
All language apply modes implement the same shared apply workflow
All language _shared.md files define market-specific compensation and employment terms
All OpenCode commands invoke the same career-ops skill
Profile config and CV drive batch evaluation and PDF generation
Pipeline integrity scripts maintain applications.md consistency

hyperedges.label: Multi-Agent CLI Context Loading (CLAUDE.md + GEMINI.md + AGENTS.md share modes/)
Pipeline Data Flow (auto-pipeline → TSV tracker-additions → merge-tracker → applications.md)
Community Governance & Enforcement (Code of Conduct + Governance + Contributing)
Core Evaluation Pipeline — oferta + pdf + tracker
Japanese Language Mode Set
CV Generation Variants — HTML PDF + LaTeX + Canva
All language pipeline modes implement the same shared pipeline workflow
All language apply modes implement the same shared apply workflow
All language _shared.md files define market-specific compensation and employment terms
All OpenCode commands invoke the same career-ops skill
Profile config and CV drive batch evaluation and PDF generation
Pipeline integrity scripts maintain applications.md consistency
